name: ChartLegend
description: ChartLegend (colored dot + label text) and ChartLegendDot (the dot alone, 2 sizes). 11 colors (the 10 Badge/ColorDots state-token colors plus a neutral 'lightGray') plus a disabled state.
sourceNote: Color mapping matches Badge/ColorDots' 10 state-token colors (gray/blue/orange/red/green/yellow/purple/sky/pink/teal -> faded/information/warning/error/success/away/feature/verified/highlighted/stable), plus an 11th 'lightGray' (--color-icon-soft) that Figma includes for a paler neutral dot.
